maturity_band: clean but generic dashboard calibration fixture

state_checks.responsive_fit: verified at desktop and compact500 through screenshot artifacts plus dump-dom layout metrics
state_checks.primary_action_visibility: not verified as a decisive action; the before variant has routine overview controls but no first-fold dispatch object
state_checks.loading_empty_error: not applicable to this static calibration fixture
state_checks.focus_keyboard_hover: not claimed; CSS focus-visible exists, but no pointer or keyboard traversal artifact was captured

required_findings: The before variant is visually tidy but overview-first: headline, metrics, queue table, chart, and notes all compete as equal dashboard ingredients.
The metric cards create card soup because risk, throughput, handoff, and age share the same surface treatment despite different operational urgency.
The first actionable owner assignment is hidden in interpretation rather than visible as a dispatch decision.
false_positive_guards: Do not score this above the low 80s because the dashboard still asks the operator to infer priority from equal overview modules.
Do not treat the local fixture as proof of production data, authenticated routing, backend integration, or real workflow behavior.
Do not claim exact 390px phone coverage; compact responsive evidence is explicitly limited to 500x844 in this run.
